zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY於大約1192年出生在法國時，她的父親Hugh von Rethel II18歲，母親Felicite de Broyes17歲。她於1224年12月之前與Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1255年1月8日在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY于大约1192年出生在法国时，她的父亲Hugh von Rethel II18岁，母亲Felicite de Broyes17岁。她于1224年12月之前与Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1255年1月8日在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: RETHEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Ithell ‘son of Ithel’, a personal name meaning ‘bountiful lord’. This name was adopted in Wales and elsewhere as a name for a chapel, as it is a homograph of a Biblical placename meaning ‘house of God’ in Hebrew (Genesis 12, 13, 28, and elsewhere in the Bible).
German: habitational name from Bethel in Westphalia.

variants.name: Ethel
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Ithell, Middle Welsh Ithael. See Bethel .

variants.name: Bethea
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Bethel  .
History: The name was brought to VA by John Bethea (known as ‘English John’) (1684– after 1750), who settled in Nansemond, VA.

nameMeanings.name: VITRY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mitri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Habib, Anis, Dima, Imad, Mitri, Moufid, Omar, Rami, Ramzi, Samir, Talaat, Zahi.  French Emile, Pierre.  Italian Antonio, Francesco, Romeo.

Arabic (Lebanon) and Coptic (Egypt): from the personal name Mitri, an abbreviation of Greek Dimitrios, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ). Bearers of this surname are Christians. Compare Metry and Mitry .
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Mitro  .

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY was born about 1192, in France, her father, Hugh von Rethel II, was 18 and her mother, Felicite de Broyes, was 17. She married Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins before December 1224, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 8 January 1255, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY est née environ 1192, à France, son père, Hugh von Rethel II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Felicite de Broyes, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins avant décembre 1224, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1255, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY um 1192 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh von Rethel II 18 und ihre Mutter Felicite de Broyes 17. Sie hat vor Dezember 1224 in Frankreich Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1255 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY è nata il circa 1192 nel Francia, sua padre, Hugh von Rethel II, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Felicite de Broyes, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins prima del dicembre 1224, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1255, nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRYが約1192年にフランスで生まれた時，父Hugh von Rethel IIは18歳，母Felicite de Broyesは17歳であった。1224年12月以前にフランスでThomas II de Coucy-Vervinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1255年1月8日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY(이)가 대략 1192년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh von Rethel II(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Felicite de Broyes(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1224년 12월 이전 프랑스에서 Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 1월 8일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em França, seu pai, Hugh von Rethel II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Felicite de Broyes, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins antes dezembro de 1224, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1255, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY родилась около 1192 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh von Rethel II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Felicite de Broyes, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins перед декабрь 1224 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 января 1255 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY nació aproximadamente 1192, en Francia, su papá, Hugh von Rethel II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Felicite de Broyes, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins antes de diciembre de 1224, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1255, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
